programme.title: Sports Scene

programme.title: Leaders Talk
programme.desc: Leaders Talk is China Media Group’s new current affairs program featuring one-on-one interviews with heads of state and high-ranking government officials and heads of international organizations. They will share their insights on the major events shaping today’s world, providing an international viewpoint to understand our times, the visions we share, the challenges we face and the efforts we can make for a better future.

programme.title: Global Watch

programme.title: Biz Talk
programme.desc: A groundbreaking 30-minute interview show, giving an in-depth look into how top companies around the world conduct business and how policymakers view the fast-changing world economy. It presents 360 degree profiles of industry movers and shakers, tech mavericks and policymakers, and drills down on the stories behind their success, to give you clarity on what’s happening in every facet of business.

programme.title: Zoom in

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and “accepted wisdom” to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, The Agenda quite simply sets The Agenda . You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world. Using virtual reality graphics to bring subjects to life, Stephen will navigate through subjects ranging from “Prove That Climate Change Exists” to “Who Will Win the Race to Space”. Opposing views will be given opportunity to flourish and develop into a meaningful conversation.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling.

programme.desc: The World Today is the core rolling service of CGTN. keep viewers up-to-date with all the world's top stories as they happen.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world.

programme.title: The World Today

programme.title: Razor
programme.desc: CGTN's brand new science and technology show, covering cutting edge developments from all over the world. RAZOR will show you the world's most powerful laser and the world's smallest anti-cancer treatment. It will take you from the weird world of quantum computing to the boundaries of the cosmos. An international team of reporters will follow the guidance of Occam's Razor - the principle that the simplest explanation is the best one. RAZOR will show that we are already "living in the future"!

programme.title: Inheritors

programme.title: Pixel Collage
programme.desc: A well-crafted collage of selected short documentaries telling stories about all aspects of China! People, technology, culture, and wildlife, all are showcased in Internet-friendly form.

programme.title: Today’s Top Pick
programme.desc: Documentaries in this slot are rebroadcasts of our most-viewed and most popular stories of the season. They feature important social, economic, environmental or other policy-driven issues, affecting lives nationwide or simply in one small village. A broad selection of top productions by Chinese top documentary producers.

programme.title: Humanities and Geography
programme.desc: A strand devoted to the nature and wildlife of China, the people who lived alongside them, and the great and diverse landscapes with which they all contend.

programme.title: Living China
programme.desc: Real life stories told from the personal perspective. Moving, dramatic, sorrows and joys, expressed emphatically and expressed quietly. Watch closely to see and understand the real China as it is lived.

programme.title: Special Edition
programme.desc: Prestige Chinese documentary production, tackling serious subjects with the best cinematography, editing, and all round production values with a unique Chinese perspective.

programme.title: Journeys and Discoveries
programme.desc: A documentary series showcasing the history of China and its people.

programme.title: History in the Frame
programme.desc: A documentary series featuring historical and archaeological exploration.

programme.title: Best Eats
programme.desc: Food connects people! A feast for the eyes that spotlights the cuisines of China in a way that’s bound to set the mouths of the whole globe watering!

programme.title: 72 Hours: True Crime
programme.desc: In 1998, in a normally peaceful suburb, a pervert on a bicycle appears, performing sexual acts on himself and then attacking teenage girls.

programme.title: Someone They Knew... With Tamron Hall
programme.sub-title: S01 : E19 Someone They Knew... With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: When Susan Wright's husband, Jeffrey, was found buried in the backyard, stabbed 193 times, people dubbed her the blue-eyed butcher of the suburbs. But what was behind this murderous rage? The answers would result one of the most sensational trials in Texas history.

programme.title: Someone They Knew... With Tamron Hall
programme.sub-title: S01 : E20 Someone They Knew... With Tamron Hall
programme.desc: Bad things happen to the people close to Robert Durst. His wife disappeared without a trace. His best friend was killed in her home. His neighbor was dismembered and thrown in the Galveston Bay.

programme.title: Accomplice to Murder With Vinnie Politan
programme.sub-title: S02 : E11 Accomplice to Murder With Vinnie Politan
programme.desc: In the peaceful village of Essex Junction, Vermont, Michael Durenleau's life would be cut short with a knife through the heart in the darkness behind Veronica's Tavern.

programme.title: Accomplice to Murder With Vinnie Politan

programme.title: 72 Hours: True Crime

programme.title: 72 Hours: True Crime

programme.title: 72 Hours: True Crime

programme.title: Victim To Verdict With Ted Rowlands
programme.sub-title: S02 : E06 Victim To Verdict With Ted Rowlands
programme.desc: A-list actor Alec Baldwin was rehearsing a scene for his Western film 'Rust' when cinematographer Halyna Hutchins was shot and killed. Who loaded the live round in the prop gun? programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon helps Senator Katherine Zappone and Dr Ann Louise Gilligan renovate a dilapidated hunting lodge in Brittas, Dublin.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot revamps a Rathfarnham four-bed to suit the changing needs of its occupants Peter, Lisa and their twins Grace and Louise (9) live in a four-bed house in Rathfarnham, Dublin 14.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: A young couple with three children seek Dermot's help in revamping their small three bedroomed bungalow in Ballinteer Ailish and Patrick Bates are a young couple running out of space - fast!

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot knows exactly how to solve the problem but it means destroying a lot of the work the couple have already done.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Childhood sweethearts are up against the clock to revamp their 70s bungalow in Enniskerry before their first baby arrives.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot needs to create "a bungalow downstairs" incorporating a bedroom, bathroom, kitchen, living and dining room.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is normally confident about presenting a plan. But with a couple as design-literate as Greg and Siobhan, the stakes are that bit higher.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Rathcoole with Mary Moore, the design solution Dermot offers Mary is one of the most unusual and interesting he has ever conceived.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Architect Dermot Bannon sets out to transform people's living spaces. Before moving in to their 1940s ex-council house in Co Kilkenny, the Kirwans added a basic extension.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot wants to turn the house completely on its head, putting the bedrooms to the front and extending the back to include a kitchen, living and dining that leads into the garden.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Templetuohy, Co. Tipperary with Joanne and Sean Cleere who believe they need a substantial extension but Dermot doesn't actually concur.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Room to Improve starts with Margaret and Jodie Burke who plan to renovate the family home in Foxrock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Pádraig Whooley and Lorraine Dufficey spent 265 thousand euros on their remote cottage at Rossmore in West Cork, they knew that - while the hilltop location was ideal - the house was far from it.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Laytown, co.Meath, with a budget of 60,000 euros, Dermot's worry "is even if you took away the shoddy workmanship you'd spend the 60k, this is a really difficult one..."

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Dalkey, with a budget of 180,000 euros, he must come up with an innovative design to match their exacting requirements within the confines of an incredibly tight site.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Clontarf, with Denise and Ben who desperately want a second bathroom for their family home, but their budget is limited.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot is in Tullow, with Tom and Lisa who want to renovate their 19th century farmhouse.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Yvonne and John live in a housing estate in Dundalk with their two children. Four years ago, they decided to buy their next-door neighbours house.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Jim and Siobhan Doyle live in a beautiful old house over looking Dublin Bay in Sutton. See Dermot Bannon transform the rambling old house into a beautiful new space.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: The series begins in Cork City with our youngest and most ambitious couple yet, Meadhbh and Niall, both 27-years-old.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: After 10 successful years living in Boston, Elaine Mitchell made the decision to come back to the old sod with her earnings.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: No close neighbours, beautiful views of the Wicklow Mountains, a large vegetable patch, 10 hens, four ducks, two geese, four beehives, two dogs and three cats.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Marcus and Margaret are about to extend a two-bed cottage in Dundrum and share it with Marcus's beloved Aunt May.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: The number one criteria when buying a house is location and our fifth programme of the series is set in one of the most sought after costal parts of the country, Dalkey.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: John Rochford from Dublin and Lee Benn, originally from Limerick, have bought a house in their dream location - South Dublin's seaside suburbia, Blackrock.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon helps a family to transform their 70s bungalow outside Tipperary into a modern family home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: This week Dermot goes to Cork to work with a family spanning three generations - who all have different ideas on how to improve their home.

programme.title: Room to Improve
programme.desc: Dermot Bannon tries to turn a dilapidated, woodworm infested 1930s cottage into a starter home for a Finglas family.

programme.title: Room to Improve

programme.title: Toyota MegaCruiser BXD10
programme.desc: The Toyota MegaCruiser BXD10 has its origins in the Japanese army; its shape won't win any beauty contests or achieve the best results in the wind tunnel, but this is not really the point with an SUV like this.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: The Pikes Peak Hill Climb of 1987: A different type of race in the mountains of Colorado, USA.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: Since 1934, the Grand Prix has been the most exciting and fascinating world championship in the world. With its state-of-the-art vehicles, with horsepower from the biggest brands, it never fails to wow its viewers.

programme.title: Classic Races
programme.desc: The International Championship for Manufacturers was a rally series which ran from 1970 - 1972.

programme.title: Classic Ride
programme.desc: An iconic racing car and one of only 29 ever built, the Mercedes 300 SL lightweight makes its premiere drive at the Mille Miglia.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: A BMW M5, in touring version.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: Discovering Mechatronik, a company dedicated to the restoration and refinement of classic Mercedes-Benz: a look at the Nissan 370 Z, Porsche Cayman, Chevrolet Camaro and Mercedes-AMG ML 63.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The GT MF 5 is a power pack.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The who's who of automotive tuning congregate at the 82nd International Motor Show in Geneva, where around 180 European and global premiers will be shown.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The tuning forge MTM is known for their extremely dynamic, optimally tuned vehicles; a look at the Nissan Juke-R, a projectile with 485 horsepower and the dimensions of a cigar box.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Audi is one of the most successful car manufacturers of the present day; the brand with the four rings stands for innovation, superior technology and unique design; founded over 100 years ago, Audi is now a successful global player.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The history of auto unions.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: At a time when horses and carriages characterized traffic, visionaries like Henry Ford were working on the mobility of tomorrow. His ideas and approaches have a major share of the individual mobilization in the world.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Few manufacturers have been as active in the USA and Europe as early as Ford - and with success; while the Mustang thrilled American youth, the Capri turned the heads of Europeans.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: Porsche has competed in the 24-hour Le Mans classic every year since 1951; the company's prototypes have won 18 times - more often than the vehicles of any other manufacturer in the history of this racing series.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Smart offers its iconic city car with a convertible option; the Mini cabriolet is bigger and provides room for four people; when it comes to roadster feeling, the Mazda MX-5 is on top of the list.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Paris Motor Show features the automotive world of tomorrow; in 2016, Mercedes-Benz introduced their Generation EQ and Volkswagen announced the making of 20 new electrified models by 2020.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The coupe form makes cars sexy. But it is a question of faith - and in part a question of value - whether to opt for a more traditional two-door coupe, like the Mercedes E400, or its bigger brother, the CLS with four doors.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: Portrait of Ferruccio Lamborghini, who originally built tractors, but then moved on to found one of the most famous sports car factories in the world.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: Ferdinand Anton Ernst Porsche was a pioneer of the car business and created an icon among automobiles, the Porsche 356.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: One of the most successful rally drivers of all time, Walter Roehrl.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: Hans Joachim Stuck, a racing legend, ended his active career as a race driver in a Lamborghini Gallardo built by Reiter Engineering at the Nurburgring in 2011.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The Land Rover Defender ends production after more than 60 years, but the British make has already announced a successor.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The Audi RS6 and the Mercedes E63 AMG are the two top sportsters among station wagons; Alpina comes up with the B5 Twin Turbo, their BMW-based answer to the competition; check out the agile Skoda Octavia Combi and the Jaguar XF Sportbrake.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: If cruising on the motorways is too boring, then off-road is the place to go. 4x4 shows how sporty and elegant SUVs really are, and which vehicles can really make your day on exciting off-road tracks.

programme.title: StreetWise
programme.desc: A spring ride around Lake Starnberg in the Ferrari 458 Italia; a test drive of BMW's 6 series convertible at Table Mountain in South Africa; a look at the Chevrolet Orlando family van.

programme.title: StreetWise
programme.desc: Testing the Audi R8 GT, a model that the car manufacturer built only 333 units of; taking a look at the Mazda MX5 roadster and Mercedes-AMG GT3.

programme.title: StreetWise
programme.desc: The Audi A6 2.0 TDI.

programme.title: StreetWise
programme.desc: Testing the Wiesmann MF5.

programme.title: Nurburgring 24 Hours
programme.desc: Nurburgring 24 Hours

programme.title: StreetWise
programme.desc: The Mercedes-Benz SL 65 AMG is the ultimate German muscle car in a tailor-made suit; a look at the Mercedes-Benz SLS AMG, a car that was once the Formula 1 safety car, and BMW's 6 series models.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: BMW, one of the most successful automobile groups in the world, promises the joy of driving.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The Porsche 550 Spyder is small, flat and fast. It wrote history, even though only 140 of them were produced.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The motor sport history of Ford.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The development of engineering at BMW has always been closely linked to motorsport; racing has always played a decisive role in shaping the brand and setting the pace for its future.

programme.title: Car History
programme.desc: The golden years of racing for Porsche.

programme.title: DreamCars
programme.desc: Exuding sophistication and grandeur like no other, a select range of English limousines dominates the world of luxury vehicles.

programme.title: DreamCars
programme.desc: The Mercedes S-Class, the BMW 7-series, or the Audi A8; Limousines 'Made in Germany' are famous for their perfection and prestige and are considered as a status symbol.

programme.title: DreamCars
programme.desc: International limousines by Rolls Royce, Bentley, Mercedes, BMW and Jaguar guarantee an exclusive appearance and stand for status, prestige and perfection; they are the benchmark when it comes to luxury and comfort.

programme.title: DreamCars
programme.desc: Power limousines like the BMW M5 and Audi RS6 offer a unique mix of luxury and high performance; these vehicles combine the comfort of a sedan with the dynamics of a sports car.

programme.title: DreamCars
programme.desc: Featuring cars built for speed, such as Bugatti Chiron, Lykan Hypersports, Pagani Huayra and Ferrari LaFerrari.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Going on mountain cruises in a sports car; as super cars become more comfortable and suitable for travelling in spite of their ever-increasing performance, what would be the perfect sports car for taking on the Alps, the Lamborghini Aventador Miura Homage, the Ferrari 458 Speciale, the McLaren 570S or the Porsche 911 Turbo S?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: To drive yourself or to be driven: That's the question here. When it comes to the Bentley Mulsanne with extended wheelbase, one can be more delighted to sit in the back of the car. But what is the situation when it comes to the sporty Maserat?

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: Both compressor charging and naturally aspirated engines have their advantages and disadvantages. In the Chevrolet Corvette, buyers can pick either of them.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: If a dream garage were built, there would be a Rolls-Royce Phantom, and an Aston Martin DBS Superleggera, as well as the Audi RS4. A car for every occasion.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: In 2018, the Audi R8 Quattro Performance received an upgrade; the new version shared some of its aerodynamic features with the Lamborghini Huracán; the Porsche Macan S got a more powerful engine.

programme.title: Supercars
programme.desc: There are details which set super cars apart from normal cars and these details are essential. Super cars are the biggest, loudest and most expensive cars on the highway; they're four-wheeled works of arts.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Smart offers its iconic city car with a convertible option; the Mini cabriolet is bigger and provides room for four people; when it comes to roadster feeling, the Mazda MX-5 is on top of the list.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Paris Motor Show features the automotive world of tomorrow; in 2016, Mercedes-Benz introduced their Generation EQ and Volkswagen announced the making of 20 new electrified models by 2020.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The coupe form makes cars sexy. But it is a question of faith - and in part a question of value - whether to opt for a more traditional two-door coupe, like the Mercedes E400, or its bigger brother, the CLS with four doors.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: Portrait of Ferruccio Lamborghini, who originally built tractors, but then moved on to found one of the most famous sports car factories in the world.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: Ferdinand Anton Ernst Porsche was a pioneer of the car business and created an icon among automobiles, the Porsche 356.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: One of the most successful rally drivers of all time, Walter Roehrl.

programme.title: Motorheads
programme.desc: Hans Joachim Stuck, a racing legend, ended his active career as a race driver in a Lamborghini Gallardo built by Reiter Engineering at the Nurburgring in 2011.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The Land Rover Defender ends production after more than 60 years, but the British make has already announced a successor.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: The Audi RS6 and the Mercedes E63 AMG are the two top sportsters among station wagons; Alpina comes up with the B5 Twin Turbo, their BMW-based answer to the competition; check out the agile Skoda Octavia Combi and the Jaguar XF Sportbrake.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: If cruising on the motorways is too boring, then off-road is the place to go. 4x4 shows how sporty and elegant SUVs really are, and which vehicles can really make your day on exciting off-road tracks.

programme.title: Small City Cars
programme.desc: Small city cars reflect the change of times regarding new technology and eco-awareness. In 2023, Mitsubishi presented the ASX as a hybrid. And: 40 years of Opel Corsa. We show its transformation from city car to urban e-vehicle.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Upper mid-range sedans have stood for decades as a perfect combination of luxury, technology, and performance. Ideal for families and long distances.

programme.title: Vive la Evolution

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: The Tucson is Hyundai's bestseller.

programme.title: Perfect Ride
programme.desc: Exploring how Subaru's Boxer engine concept works in the Subaru XV model; Hyundai i30N vs. Volkswagen Golf GTI.

programme.title: FIGHT VAULT

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: When the last surviving cosmonaut from the International Space Station crashes on Earth, Citizen Z gets a real, live buddy - but it quickly becomes clear that his new friend has a secret agenda.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: While in South Dakota, an imminent meltdown forces the team to help the locals repair a nearby nuclear power plant full of radiated zombies.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: In need of shelter and supplies, the team seeks refuge in an all-female compound where men are not allowed.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Some strangers earn their ways into the team, taking a keen interest in Murphy, but things take a deadly turn.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Picking up moments after the launch of the tactical nuclear weapons, the team is split up trying to outrun the impending blast. Citizen Z finds himself battling thawed zombies, ultimately issuing an on-air bounty for Murphy.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Each member of the group goes through a near-death experience while being attacked by bounty hunters. Mack is bitten after being caught in a zombie-infested stairwell.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: After finally tracking down Murphy, the group comes across a caravan of survivors transporting victims of the nuclear blast to safety. Along the way, the mission is attacked by "blasters," zombies mutated by the radioactive fallout.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: On the quest for a cure for the virus, the group makes its way to the greenhouse where Batch 47 is being grown by Odegard. There, Odegard warns them about zombie-plant hybrids.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Murphy's past comes back to haunt him when Serena tracks him down. The team stumbles upon a hidden farm.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: While crossing the Mississippi River, the group is involved in an accident and 10K is separated. At a nearby settlement, 10K and some new friends run into trouble with the settlement's leader, Escorpion.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Tricked into a trap by use of a fresh brain lure, Murphy is captured by a zombie fan known as The Collector.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Near Roswell, New Mexico, the group encounters a community, led by a woman called Bernadette, which they believe is above a secret underground base that may contain useful equipment.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Murphy, Warren, Vasquez and Addy find themselves at a casino while 10K and Doc are captured by Natives.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Near the Mexican border, the group is rescued from a zombie hoard by Escorpion, who leads them to La Reina, the "Queen of the Dead." As a bounty for Murphy, La Reina offers them a reward or a free pass to join her group.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: All hell breaks loose when it's discovered that not only does Dr. Kurian's vaccine not work but everyone who was injected will come under Murphy's control after an incubation period.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: The team finally arrives in California. As they near their goal, each member thinks back to where they were at the beginning of the apocalypse and what it took to get where they are today.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: In Los Angeles, the team drives through the abandoned city to the coordinates of the mobile CDC lab provided by Citizen Z. There, they discover the lab isn't just a lab - it's a submarine.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: In this epic flashback movie, the gang protects the town against a new enemy known as The Man. Part 2.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren and the group are taken prisoner while Murphy manages to escape with his newly formed group of blends.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: While on the road to establish his headquarters in Spokane, Murphy saves the life of a dying girl. When her parents show up and ask to be bitten too, his mission gains momentum. Meanwhile, Warren leads the new mission group to a strange town.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: As more people flock to Murphy's new cult, Dr. Merch works on a blend vaccine as well as a booster shot to slow to Murphy's descent into zombiedom.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Doc finds himself taken captive by a psychotic nurse and her surviving mental patients, and he later discovers that 10K is being held too.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Seemingly injected with the blend vaccine, The Man attempts to kidnap Murphy but underestimates the strength of Murphy's followers. However, he does manage to learn about Lucy's existence. 10K reunites with the group.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Looking for Lucy, Doc and Addy run into Skeezy and Sketch, who is running for "President of the Apocalypse."

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren and the others inspect Murphytown and realize they are going to need a bigger army to extract Murphy. Warren finds an old ally in El Escorpion.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Doc tries to find a way to tell Warren about Lucy's kidnapping. In the meantime, he encounters a radio tower and castle-like compound inhabited by three attractive, crafty ladies.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Warren leads an attack against Murphytown to extract its smug leader.

programme.title: Z Nation
programme.desc: Addy is being pummeled with whatever The Man can throw at her - and Lucy does the same right back.

programme.title: Pod Mocnym Smarzolem
programme.desc: Dokument przedstawia proces powstawania filmowej adaptacji powieści Jerzego Pilcha, "Pod Mocnym Aniołem".

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: Will Shaw (Henry Cavill) przybywa do Hiszpanii na tygodniowe wakacje pod żaglami z rodziną, pomimo napiętych relacji z surowym ojcem Martinem (Bruce Willis). Sytuacja przybiera nieoczekiwany i gwałtowny obrót, gdy jego rodzina zostaje porwana przez agentów wywiadu.

programme.title: The Condemned
programme.desc: Jack Conrad oczekuje na karę śmierci w skorumpowanym więzieniu. Zostaje "zakupiony" przez bogatego producenta telewizyjnego i zabrany na wyspę, gdzie musi walczyć na śmierć i życie z dziewięcioma innymi skazanymi zabójcami.

programme.title: Lekarstwo na życie
programme.desc: Młody mężczyzna przybywa do sielankowego spa w szwajcarskich Aplach, aby zabrać stamtąd swojego szefa. Mężczyzna szybko odkrywa, że cudowne leczenie skrywa mroczny sekret.

programme.title: Córka Prezydenta
programme.desc: Córka prezydenta pragnie normalnie studiować, lecz jej pochodzenie tego nie ułatwia.

programme.title: Wyklęty
programme.desc: Oparty na faktach film, którego akcja toczy się w Polsce, w drugiej połowie lat 40-tych. Jego bohaterami są członkowie zbrojnego podziemia niepodległościowego, walczący z władzą ludową o powojenny kształt Polski.

programme.title: Pod Mocnym Smarzolem
programme.desc: Dokument przedstawia proces powstawania filmowej adaptacji powieści Jerzego Pilcha, "Pod Mocnym Aniołem".

programme.title: Wampiry i świry
programme.desc: WAMPIRY I ŚWIRY to komedia o nastoletnich obawach i romansie. Becca jest zaniepokojoną nastolatką, która jest rozdarta pomiędzy dwoma chłopcami.

programme.title: Czas diabła 2
programme.desc: Demoniczna siła opanowała miasteczko i nikt nie jest bezpieczny. Jedynym, kto zdaje się cokolwiek wiedzieć, jest pastor miasteczka.

programme.title: Mały wielki wojownik
programme.desc: Chiny, 227 p.n.e. Liang bierze do niewoli generała, by zdobyć nagrodę, a między nimi rodzi się nieoczekiwana więź.

programme.title: I Can Quit Whenever I Want
programme.desc: Trzech pogrążonych w niełasce nauczycieli akademickich zamienia się w handlarzy narkotyków po tym, jak jeden z nich tworzy nową eksperymentalną pigułkę...

programme.title: Runaway Jury
programme.desc: Członek ławy przysięgłych oraz „konsultant” próbują wpłynąć na werdykt.

programme.title: Zakręcony
programme.desc: Elliot Richards to nieszczęśliwy młody mężczyzna dręczony nieodwzajemnioną miłością, który desperacko pragnie odmienić swój los, więc zawiera pakt z Diabłem, który mu to sprytnie obiecuje, co ma swoją cenę.

programme.title: Where's the Money?
programme.desc: W tej skandalicznie śmiesznej komedii Del, sprytny młodzieniec wychowany na ulicach South Central Los Angeles, dowiaduje się, że jego osadzony ojciec wraz z wujkiem, który właśnie wyszedł na wolność (Terry Crews), ukradli milion dolarów i pieniądze ukryli w piwnicy noclegowni.

programme.title: Otoczeni
programme.desc: Dwie siostry muszą wykorzystać swoją siłę, zaradność i ogromną odwagę, aby przetrwać przerażający atak rekina.

programme.title: Sen nocy letniej
programme.desc: Najpopularniejsza sztuka Szekspira, przeniesiona do zalanej słońcem i zielenią scenerii północnej Italii końca dziewiętnastego wieku.

programme.title: Intersections
programme.desc: Małżeństwo spędzające miesiąc miodowy w Maroku przeżywa śmiertelny wypadek samochodowy na środku pustyni.

programme.title: Czas zabijania
programme.desc: Stare nawyki ciężko wykorzenić... Zwłaszcza na zmieniającym się południu USA. Carl Lee Hailey, pracownik fabryki w Mississippi dowiaduje się tego, gdy jego dziesięcioletnia siostra zostaje brutalnie napadnięta przez dwóch pijanych rasistów.

programme.title: Meet the Spartans
programme.desc: Meet The Spartans, film twórców „Komedii romantycznej”, jest komiczną parodią epickiego filmu spod znaku miecza i sandałów.

programme.title: Haunting of the Queen Mary
programme.desc: Haunting of the Queen Mary bada tajemnicze i brutalne wydarzenia związane z podróżą jednej rodziny w noc Halloween w 1938 roku oraz ich losy splecione z inną rodziną na pokładzie niesławnego liniowca.

programme.title: U Pana Boga Za Miedzą
programme.desc: Do Królowego Mostu przyjeżdża Marina, która ma nauczyć miejscowych policjantów obsługi komputera. Jednocześnie zbliżają się wybory burmistrza.

programme.title: Jak uratować mamę
programme.desc: Dwoje dzieci wyrusza do średniowiecznej krainy, by odnaleźć Złote Krople, które pomogą uratować ich mamę.

programme.title: Wyklęty
programme.desc: Oparty na faktach film, którego akcja toczy się w Polsce, w drugiej połowie lat 40-tych. Jego bohaterami są członkowie zbrojnego podziemia niepodległościowego, walczący z władzą ludową o powojenny kształt Polski.

programme.title: The Cold Light of Day
programme.desc: Will Shaw (Henry Cavill) przybywa do Hiszpanii na tygodniowe wakacje pod żaglami z rodziną, pomimo napiętych relacji z surowym ojcem Martinem (Bruce Willis). Sytuacja przybiera nieoczekiwany i gwałtowny obrót, gdy jego rodzina zostaje porwana przez agentów wywiadu.

programme.title: Sex Doll
programme.desc: Ekskluzywna prostytutka wdaje się w niebezpieczny romans z tajemniczym mężczyzną.

programme.title: Copycat
programme.desc: Ambitna detektyw próbuje wyciągnąć psycholożkę kryminalną z dobrowolnego wygnania, aby pomóc złapać mordercę, który naśladuje zbrodnie innych seryjnych morderców.

programme.title: Pod Mocnym Smarzolem
programme.desc: Dokument przedstawia proces powstawania filmowej adaptacji powieści Jerzego Pilcha, "Pod Mocnym Aniołem".

programme.title: U Pana Boga W Ogródku
programme.desc: Do Królowego Mostu trafia najgorszy z absolwentów szkoły policyjnej. Jednocześnie miejscowość ta zostaje wybrana na azyl dla świadka koronnego w procesie mafii.

programme.title: Czas polowania
programme.desc: Warren (Martin Dingle Wall) jest zdegenerowanym alkoholikiem. Po drodze do Meksyku zatrzymuje się w Bedford Flats – zapadłym amerykańskim miasteczku pośrodku bezkresnego pustkowia, zamieszkałego niegdyś przez społeczność myśliwych.

programme.title: JFK
programme.desc: Prokurator okręgowy w Nowym Orleanie, Jim Garrison, przejmuje śledztwo w sprawie zabójstwa prezydenta Johna F. Kennedy'ego w Dallas, w Teksasie, w 1963 roku. Poznaje fakty, które budzą w nim podejrzenie, że sprawa jest znacznie bardziej złożona, niż to, o czym się dowiaduje opinia publiczna.
